attestor: Claude Code (claude-opus-4-8[1m]) — DOC-016 Docs Integrity CI Gate, STOA-Automation lens

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: scripts/pre-ship.mjs typecheck step (turbo run typecheck). Standalone tsc --noEmit over docs-integrity-audit.ts: exit 0. Types reuse content-audit.ts's AuditData; no production source changed.

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: npx vitest run tools/scripts/__tests__/docs-integrity-audit.test.ts — 21/21 pass (mismatch detection for every total/aggregate label, false-positive guardrails, missing-doc/missing-citation, temp-fixture filesystem path, live-repo smoke). route-total-consistency.test.ts (DOC-015) still 15/15.

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: npx eslint over docs-integrity-audit.ts + test + pre-ship.mjs: exit 0. npx prettier --check over all DOC-016 files: 'All matched files use Prettier code style!'.

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: scripts/pre-ship.mjs build step (turbo). DOC-016 adds one tools/scripts CLI + its test + a workflow + docs; no app/package build inputs changed.

gate_results.log_path: npx tsx tools/scripts/docs-integrity-audit.ts => 'Canonical (live filesystem): total=211 public=32 auth-gated=165 developer=14 | Docs checked: 7 | canonical citations: 13 | duration: 85ms | No drift'. Exit 0.

Targeted istanbul coverage over tools/scripts/docs-integrity-audit.ts: 92.15% statements, 90% functions, 91.57% lines, 85.71% branches (uncovered = CLI main()/entry guard + one defensive default). Meets the >=90% statement/function/line DoD. Note: tools/** is excluded from the global coverage include, so this is evidenced by a scoped run.

Unit tests assert the 209 distinct-collapsed count, 257 bucket-sum, flows/layouts/API-routers, and dates produce zero findings; verified live against content-audit.md which still carries the 209/257 traps and passes with 0 findings.

Unit tests inject a wrong number for every canonical-total label (Total Pages/Total Routes/page.tsx entries/filesystem total) and every tier aggregate (public/auth-gated/developer) — each is surfaced as a finding. 100% detection of injected mismatches.
npx prettier --check over docs-integrity-audit.ts, its test, docs-integrity.yml, pre-ship.mjs, content-audit.md, docs-integrity-gate.md: clean.

scripts/pre-ship.mjs is the non-bypassable pre-push hook (no PRESHIP_ALLOW_MISSING / PRESHIP_KEEP_GOING / --no-verify). The `docs-integrity` step was added to STEPS. The pushed commit lands only if the full gate (format/lint/typecheck/unit/integration/coverage/build/security + docs-integrity) is green.

kpi_results.actual: 100% (every injected total/aggregate mismatch surfaced in unit tests)
0% (unrelated figures — 209/257/flows/layouts/routers/dates — never flagged; live content-audit.md passes clean)

definition_of_done_items.criterion: CI workflow runs on app route and docs changes and fails on any drift
definition_of_done_items.evidence: .github/workflows/docs-integrity.yml triggers on apps/web/src/app/**/page.tsx, apps/web/src/app/**/layout.tsx, docs/design/**, and the audit scripts; runs the CLI + regression tests, uploads docs-integrity-report, comments on the PR, and fails on drift.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Tests cover mismatch scenarios and false-positive guardrails
definition_of_done_items.evidence: tools/scripts/__tests__/docs-integrity-audit.test.ts — 21/21: injected mismatch per label + aggregate, false-positive traps (209/257/flows/dates), missing-doc/missing-citation, temp-fixture filesystem path, live-repo smoke.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Local pre-ship catches drift too (docs-integrity step)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: scripts/pre-ship.mjs gains a required `docs-integrity` step running `pnpm tsx tools/scripts/docs-integrity-audit.ts`, mirroring the CI gate on every branch push.

environment.node_version: v22 (repo-pinned; host default v25 avoided for DB writes)

notes: DOC-016 (Docs Integrity CI Gate, R-023 mitigation) is the enforcement half of DOC-014 -> DOC-015 -> DOC-016. It depends on DOC-015's reconciliation, so this branch is cut from the DOC-015 state and must land only after DOC-015 is on origin/main (otherwise the gate correctly fails against pre-reconciliation docs). Direct verification this session: CLI clean (211 routes, 13 citations, 0 drift, 85ms), 21/21 unit tests, scoped coverage >=90% (stmts/funcs/lines), prettier + eslint clean. Full 4-validation + docs-integrity gating is enforced by the non-bypassable scripts/pre-ship.mjs pre-push hook; the landed commit exists on origin only if that gate passed green.
